summary: W1477 refines the W1476 W987 construction by replacing the normalized lift map-image normalization law with two componentwise map-image laws: zero and one component map-image normalization. It reconstructs the bundled map-image law, feeds the resulting W1476 input, and lets W1476/W1475/W1474/W1473/W1472 reconstruct the raw lift functoriality, map strict-preimage data, object strict-preimage data, raw lift blueprint, and normalized lift blueprint while reassembling W519, W973, W945, W730, W986, and W987. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1477 reconstructs the W987 route from fifty-nine assumed inputs, including raw boundary fields, raw relation fields, target-difference surjectivity and target-codomain compact no-univ membership primitive families, three W714 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component fields, a raw mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding field, eight normalized-lift object strict-preimage fields, six normalized-lift map strict-preimage fields, normalized-lift zero and one source-map identity laws, normalized-lift zero and one source-map composition laws, normalized-lift object-image normalization, normalized-lift zero and one component map-image normalization laws, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation fields, endpoint kernel/cokernel-top fields, localized right-adjoint object and morphism maps plus identity and composition laws, localized adjunction unit/counit component and naturality fields, localized adjunction left/right triangle component identity fields, unit-mapping-cone kernel/cokernel-top fields, and unit-mapping-cone iso hom/inv/identity fields rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.
